transactions.desc: The Padres designated Adcock for assignment Sunday.
The Padres selected Hunt's contract from Triple-A El Paso on Sunday.
The Rockies reinstated Freeman (concussion) from the 7-day injured list Sunday. He'll start in right field and bat second in the Rockies' series finale against the Athletics in Las Vegas.
The Royals recalled Rave from Triple-A Omaha on Sunday.
The Guardians designated Valera for assignment Sunday, Zack Meisel of The Athletic reports.
The Guardians reinstated Arias (hamstring) from the 60-day injured list Sunday, Zack Meisel of The Athletic reports.
The Reds optioned Higgins to Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
The Reds reinstated Trevino (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
The Rockies sent Bellozo outright to Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Rockies optioned Criswell to Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Rockies selected Castellano's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
Texas recalled Freeman from Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
The Pirates recalled Bidois from Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday.
The Tigers recalled Lee from Triple-A Toledo on Saturday.
The Rangers designated Otanez for assignment Saturday.
The Rangers optioned Curvelo to Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
The Rangers selected Ross's contract from Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
The Tigers optioned Madden to Triple-A Toledo on Saturday, Evan Woodbery of MLive.com reports.
The Tigers reinstated Skubal (elbow) from the injured list ahead of his start Saturday against Cleveland, Evan Woodbery of MLive.com reports.
The Padres selected Solak's contract from Triple-A El Paso on Saturday.
The Nationals recalled Poulin from Triple-A Rochester on Saturday.
The Pirates optioned Kelly to Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Pirates recalled Mattson from Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Pirates optioned Flores to Triple-A Indianapolis on Saturday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Pirates reinstated Davis from the paternity list Saturday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Yankees reinstated Dominguez (shoulder) from the injured list Saturday.
Atlanta recalled Molina from Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday.
The Nationals optioned Cornelio to Triple-A Rochester on Friday.
The Cubs optioned Ferguson to Triple-A Iowa on Friday.
The Cubs reinstated Thornton from the paternity list Friday.
